[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100111 4
1 0101110 4
2 0000010 1
3 0001100 2
4 0000000 a
5 0001001 2
6 0000001 1
7 0000001 1

01 10 0000001 1 match 6 7
12 21 0000001 1 match 6 7

56 65 0000010 1 match 2
67 76 1000000 1
70 07 0001001 2 match 5

13 31 1000000 1
24 42 0100111 4 match 0

46 64 0000010 1 match 2
57 75 0001100 2 match 3
60 06 0000000 a match 4
71 17 1000001 2

47 74 0000101 2
50 05 0001000 1
61 16 1000000 1
72 27 0001101 3

37 73 1001100 3
